MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-13-2015 CONTINUED TO APR-16-2015 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL ORALLY REQUESTS AT TRIAL CALL FOR THE TRIAL TO BE CONTINUED DUE TO HER HEALTH ISSUES. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL OPPOSES THE ORAL REQUEST. THE COURT THEN ORDERS FOR DEFENDANT TO FILE A MOTION ON SHORTENED TIME TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE SO THAT PROPER DOCUMENTS CAN BE PRESENTED IN COURT REGARDING ASSESSMENT OF HER ILLNESS. DEFENDANT TO FILE MOTION BY NOON ON 4/14/15. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
